title: They Muted Palestine, Not the N-Word
description: BBC airs N-word slur at BAFTAs (2-hr delay!) but CUTS "Free Palestine" from winner's speech, hypocrisy exposed? Outrage erupts over selective censorship!

title: LeBron Israel Take Sparks Outrage
description: LeBron James is facing backlash after saying he’s heard “great things” about Israel, with critics accusing the NBA star of ignoring the ongoing conflict.
